name: Sweet Potato Souffle
recipeIngredient: 4 cups sweet potatoes, mashed, no juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first six ingredients together and place in a buttered 2-quart baking dish.
2. Mix all topping ingredients well. Place on top of the souffle before baking.
3. Bake with a lid on for 25 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Bake an additional 10 minutes without the lid.
5. Serve hot.
